bullets: Assisted in configuring, monitoring, and troubleshooting enterprise networks, including routers, switches, and firewalls.
Applied CCNA coursework in subnetting, VLAN configuration, and routing protocols to support production environments.
Worked to develop a Python-based network monitoring tool to track network device status and performance metrics.
Taught elementary, middle, and high school students about engineering and provided individualized support.
Managed location inventory and coordinated logistics to ensure classroom materials were ready for use.
Developed curriculum for Python and Java courses designed for all ages, and implemented new technology in classes.
